title: Overgrown's Dwueth'var, Star Razor
description: Add a custom Dungeons and Dragons inspired CIT 3D sword that you obtain by renaming any sword or axe item from Critical Role.
body:
**IF YOU ARE USING VERSIONS BELOW 1.21 (Otherwise, ignore)**: Requires the mod [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) if you are using [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/).

**This Pack Adds**:
- Custom 3D Weapon

**Texture Pack Detail**:

- **Star Razor** (Rename _any_ vanilla **Axe** or **Sword** item)
- **Dwueth'var** (Rename _any_ vanilla **Axe** or **Sword** item)
- **Dwueth'var, the Star Razor** (Rename _any_ vanilla **Axe** or **Sword** item)

I've been a huge nerd and while I haven't played it, [Dungeons & Dragons](https://www.dndbeyond.com/) has been a part of my life, it helped me develop stories, magic systems, served a big inspiration for characters and even [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) I've made in the past. So, when I saw there a [Dungeons & Dragons Jam](https://www.planetminecraft.com/jam/dndjam/) I quickly got to work on something that I could upload just to participate in the appreciation of this game.

I very early on decided I was going to make a weapon but didn't know which one and then I rediscovered this [ artwork](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/criticalrole/images/c/c6/Dwueth%27var.png) by [Ari](https://criticalrole.fandom.com/wiki/Ari), the artist for [ Critical Role](https://criticalrole.fandom.com/wiki/Critical_Role). They drew a sword called: "[Star Razor](https://criticalrole.fandom.com/wiki/Star_Razor)", and while I haven't sat down and watched a whole campaign just because of the length of them, I have read a lot about their campaigns and stories and lore. Star Razor was one of my favorite swords I read about years ago and knew I had to make it.

I love the way its drawn and just the shape of how clean it looks. I decided to this was going to be the sword I would make to upload to the Jam, it was from Critical Role, a major part of the DnD community and a weapon that I would absolutely love to have in-game. And today, I present to you guys... Dwueth'var, the Star Razor
